description_long: This is a conical woven picnic basket with a wide base and a narrower, flat top, featuring a tightly interlaced wicker pattern. The basket is primarily a natural beige color, accented by bands of red and dark brown weaving near the top and bottom edges. A circular lid sits flush on the top, with a small, looped handle at its center, also woven and matching the basket's color scheme. The weave is dense and uniform, suggesting durability and a traditional hand-crafted style. The basket appears lightweight and portable, suitable for carrying food or personal items in an urban park or outdoor setting. Decorative elements are minimal, with the colored bands providing visual interest and a touch of rustic charm.
description: A conical, tightly woven wicker picnic basket with red and brown accent bands and a matching looped handle on its flat lid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the basket's wide base, flat lid with a central looped handle, and prominent red and brown accent bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the basket's conical shape and the lid's handle, with accent bands visible along the rim and base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the woven texture, lid, and handle, with accent bands encircling the basket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the conical profile and decorative bands, with the handle slightly angled.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed loop handle, woven from the same material as the basket, attached at the center of the lid.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; flat, circular, woven lid that sits flush on top and can be lifted off.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with consistent interlacing; accented by colored bands for decoration.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None; lid is simply placed on top without a locking mechanism.
